CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-09-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Julia M. Adams, Esq. appeared with petitioner Yvonnette Roland, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor K.L., who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $15,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $4,418,00.
Medical Expenses - $70.00.

A net balance of $10,512.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, Stonestown Branch, located at 599 Buckingham Way, San Francisco, CA 94132. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
